settings.title:
Not just a night out.
The best night of your trip.

settings.editor: A party tour is the fastest way to go from stranger to best friend in a city you don't know yet. This isn't about how much you drink. It's about who you meet. Many people join completely sober and have the best night of their trip.

settings.html:
• 🎁 Exclusive surprises at every stop — the best icebreaker in Barcelona
  • 🎉 VIP entry to Barcelona's best club — no queue, your name's already on the list
  • 📍 4 handpicked bars you'd never find on your own (tourists miss all of these)
  • 🌍 A crew from 20+ countries — by bar 2, you'll feel like you've known them for years
  • 🔁 Buy once · come back free — no expiry, no catch

tabs.tab_title: Is it worth it for the price?
tabs.tab_content: Absolutely. €14.99 gets you 2 hours of open bar, exclusive surprises, entry to 4 bars, and VIP club access with no queues. A single drink at a Barcelona club can cost €12. The math is easy.

tabs.tab_title: Can I join if I'm traveling solo?
tabs.tab_content: Yes — most people join solo or in small groups. The whole point is to meet people. Within the first 15 minutes you'll already be talking to someone new. It's the best icebreaker in the city.

Completely. Our guides are experienced, know the venues personally, and stay with the group all night. We've run thousands of nights without incident. The guide's job is to make sure you have fun and get home safely.

tabs.tab_title: What's the 'buy once, come again for free' deal?
tabs.tab_content: If you've already done our party tour, your second time is free. Just show your ticket or let us know at the meeting point. No catch, no expiry.
The tour runs rain or shine — Barcelona's bars are indoors and the club at the end is always covered. A bit of rain never stopped a good night out.

tabs.tab_title: Can I book a private party tour for a group?
tabs.tab_content: Yes. We do stag parties, birthdays, Erasmus groups, and company events. Contact us via WhatsApp for a custom quote — we handle everything.
Las Ramblas 130, Barcelona. Show up at 21:00. Look for the KING sign or the group already forming. If you're lost, WhatsApp us and we'll find you.

tabs.tab_title: What even is a party tour?
tabs.tab_content: A party tour is a social night out where a group of strangers moves together through a series of bars and ends up at a club — guided by someone who knows exactly where to go. The magic is that by bar 2 or 3, nobody's a stranger anymore.

tabs.tab_title: Do I have to drink alcohol?
tabs.tab_content: Not at all. Many people join completely sober and have an incredible night. The tour is about the people and the experience — drinks are just the backdrop. The open bar is there if you want it, but nobody's watching what's in your glass.
Smart casual — clean jeans, trainers, a nice top. Avoid sportswear, sandals, or sleeveless tops as some venues won't let you in. When in doubt: go one level smarter than you think you need to.
18+ strictly. Bring a valid ID (passport or national ID card) — venues will check. No ID, no entry. No exceptions.
